name: list_cities
description: Retrieve a list of cities within a specified state and country that have air quality monitoring data available. This is the final step in a location drill-down. The city names returned here must be used exactly when calling the get_city_data endpoint to fetch air quality and weather information.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State or province name (must match exactly as returned by the list_states endpoint).

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Country name (must match exactly as returned by the list_countries endpoint).
